title: OakTree 624863 "Happy 80th Birthday Foil Holographic Banner, Blue
features: Ideal for any milestone birthday party
Each banner has the message "Happy 80th Birthday!" printed three times across the length of the banner.
Can be easily cut into three smaller pieces
Lightweight and easy to display, the holographic effect sparkles in light.
description: Product Description Oaktree Blue 9ft Holographic Foil Banner "Happy 80th Birthday!". Each pack contains 1 banner which can be cut into three mini banners if preferred. Safety Warning Not appropriate for children under the age of 3 years Box Contains 1x Foil Banner See more
